biography: Zoë Bleu Sidel is an American socialite, model, actress and fashion stylist. She is part of the famous Arquette family: the only daughter of actress Rosanna Arquette, granddaughter of actor Lewis Arquette, and the niece of actors Richmond Arquette, Alexis Arquette, David Arquette, and Patricia Arquette.
name: Zoë Bleu Sidel
